symbols.name: Log(Result, ILogger, string, params object[])
symbols.summary: Logs a non-generic BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result using structured logging with default levels (Debug on success, Warning on failure).
symbols.remarks: This method never alters the business outcome or throws. It emits consistent fields: LogKey, Messages (count), Errors (count), and for failures, ErrorTypes (array of error type names).

syntax.content: public static Result Log(this Result result, ILogger logger, string messageTemplate = null, params object[] args)

parameters.description: The result instance to log.
The logger to write to. If null, the method is a no-op and returns the original result.
Optional message template for structured logging (e.g., "Finished operation {Operation}").
Optional structured logging arguments corresponding to messageTemplate.

returns.description: The original result unchanged.

parameters.description: The result instance to log.
The logger to write to. If null, the method is a no-op and returns the original result.
Optional message template for structured logging (e.g., "Finished operation {Operation}").
Optional structured logging arguments corresponding to messageTemplate.

returns.description: The original result unchanged.

symbols.name: Log(Result, ILogger, string, LogLevel, LogLevel, params object[])

symbols.summary: Logs a non-generic BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result using structured logging with custom levels.
symbols.remarks: Logging exceptions are swallowed and do not affect the returned BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result.

parameters.description: The result instance to log.
The logger to write to. If null, the method is a no-op and returns the original result.
Optional message template for structured logging (e.g., "Handled {Operation}").
The log level used when the result indicates success.
The log level used when the result indicates failure.
Optional structured logging arguments corresponding to messageTemplate.

returns.description: The original result unchanged.

symbols.name: When(Result, bool, Func)
symbols.summary: Conditionally executes a chain of operations on the result based on an external condition. If the condition is false, the original result is returned unchanged.

syntax.content: public static Result When(this Result result, bool condition, Func operation)

parameters.description: The result to operate on.
The condition that determines whether to execute the operations.
A function that receives the result and returns a transformed result through chained operations.

returns.description: The transformed result if condition is true and result is successful; otherwise, the original result.
